Interface PixelReader

All Known Implementing Classes:
AWTRasterImage.Reader, IntBufferPixelAccessor
public interface PixelReader
Allows reading pixel data from an image/framebuffer in ARGB format.
See Also:
  • ARGB
  • RasterImage.createPixelReader()
  • OffscreenFramebuffer.createPixelReader()

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default int[][]
    getAll()
    Returns the entire image as a 2D array using row-major order.
    int
    getARGB(int x, int y)
    Returns the color of the given point in ARGB format.
    default int[]
    getColumn(int x)
    Returns a vertical line of pixels at the specified X coordinate.
    default Point2D
    getDimensions()
    Returns a vector representing the dimensions of underlying image data.
    int
    getHeight()
    Returns the height of underlying image data.
    default int[]
    getRow(int y)
    Returns a horizontal line of pixels at the specified Y coordinate.
    int
    getWidth()
    Returns the width of underlying image data.

  • Method Details

    • getARGB

      int getARGB(int x, int y)
      Returns the color of the given point in ARGB format.
      Parameters:
      x - the X coordinate of the point
      y - the Y coordinate of the point
      Returns:
      the color of the point

    • getWidth

      int getWidth()
      Returns the width of underlying image data.
      Returns:
      the width, always positive

    • getHeight

      int getHeight()
      Returns the height of underlying image data.
      Returns:
      the height, always positive

    • getDimensions

      default Point2D getDimensions()
      Returns a vector representing the dimensions of underlying image data.
      Returns:
      the dimensions, both always positive

    • getRow

      default int[] getRow(int y)
      Returns a horizontal line of pixels at the specified Y coordinate.
      Parameters:
      y - the Y coordinate
      Returns:
      all pixels at the given Y coordinate

    • getColumn

      default int[] getColumn(int x)
      Returns a vertical line of pixels at the specified X coordinate.
      Parameters:
      x - the X coordinate
      Returns:
      all pixels at the given X coordinate

    • getAll

      default int[][] getAll()
      Returns the entire image as a 2D array using row-major order.
      Returns:
      the entire image data
